chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI CP No.D-4416 of 2024 ___________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) For order as to maintainability of petition 06.11.2025 Mr. Ali Asadullah Bullo, advocate for the petitioner Ms. Wajiha M. Mehdi, Assistant Attorney General Ms. Saima Imdad, Assistant Advocate General a/w Mushtaque Ahmed, Assistant Director, Agriculture Department --------- Learned Assistant Advocate General Sindh has filed Working Paper for Provincial Selection Board-I dated 05th March, 2025 and as such that Working Paper for promotion of Additional Director (BS-19) to the post of Additional Director General (BS-20) of Agriculture Engineering Wing of Agriculture, Supply & Prices Department, is being placed before PSB-I for consideration. Learned counsel for the petitioner would be satisfied if this matter is placed before PSB-I within months of the date of this order and decision is made in respect of case of the petitioner according to law. Learned Assistant Advocate General Sindh has no objection to such proposition. Order accordingly. A copy of this order shall be sent to the Chief Secretary, Sindh, and the Secretary, Services General Administration and Coordination Department, Government of Sindh, for compliance. The petition stands disposed of in the above terms alongwith pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
